articles.title: Jewellery likely to be worth €4m stolen from French museum, probe on
articles.summary: Millions of euros worth of exquisite jewellery vanished from the Lalique museum in Wingen-sur-Moder, France, after a daring pre-dawn burglary. Thieves targeted the jewellery room, making off with approximately twenty pieces.

articles.title: Putin & Zelenskyy hold separate calls with Trump
articles.summary: A Ukrainian strike on Russian-occupied Crimea claimed one life and injured two others early Sunday. This comes as both Ukrainian and Russian presidents held separate calls with US President Donald Trump, discussing potential peace initiatives.

articles.title: Precious metals rate today: Gold holds near 2-week high; silver extends gains
articles.summary: Gold recorded a weekly gain of more than 2% last week, ending a four-week losing streak after weaker-than-expected US payroll data improved sentiment towards the precious metal. The rebound came as investors reduced expectations of prolonged high interest rates following signs of a cooling US labour market, allowing bullion to recover from recent lows.

articles.title: Mumbai University postpones July 6 exams as IMD alert, monsoon chaos bring city to a halt
articles.summary: The University of Mumbai has postponed all undergraduate and postgraduate examinations scheduled for July 6, 2026, following persistent rainfall and an IMD weather advisory. Citing severe waterlogging and transport disruptions across the city, the university prioritised student safety.

articles.title: AIIMS New Delhi declares results for more than 460 faculty posts using blockchain technology
articles.summary: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), New Delhi, has announced the selection results for more than 460 faculty posts across over 50 disciplines at AIIMS New Delhi and the AIIMS-Central Armed Police Forces Institute of Medical Sciences (CAPFIMS) campus. Conducted over six months, the recruitment process received more than 3,200 applications and used blockchain digital technology, digitally locked marks and automated merit list generation to ensure confidentiality, transparency and quicker declaration of results..

articles.title: Mumbai schools shut today as BMC declares holiday amid heavy rain alert
articles.summary: Schools and colleges across Mumbai, Thane and Palghar remained closed today after authorities declared aholiday following the India Meteorological Department's orange alert for heavy rainfall. The precautionary measure was taken to ensure student safety as heavy showers and gusty winds are forecast.

articles.title: JoSAA Counselling 2026 round 3 seat allotment result today; check reporting schedule and admission process
articles.summary: The JoSAA Counselling 2026 round 3 seat allotment result will be announced at 5 pm on July 6, 2026, on the official website. Candidates allotted seats must complete online reporting, document upload and fee payment by the prescribed deadlines.
